parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: 'Google Drive', description: 'Auto-synced documents from Google Drive AI Knowledge folder' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ content: ($json.isEdit ? '🔄' : '📄') + ' **Knowledge Base Updated**

File: `' + $json.filename + '`
Action: ' + ($json.isEdit ? 'File updated (re-synced)' : 'New file ingested') + '
KB: Google Drive
Time: ' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ content: '🗑️ **Knowledge Base Updated**

File: `' + $json.filename + '`
Action: File removed
KB: Google Drive
Time: ' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }) }}
